reviews.review_description: This is a very good game. I am surprised that there was no one in any servers! I had fun messing with the cosmetics. I do think that there should be more weapons for pvp and a HP system.

This app just released, and has very basic stuff. The map has trees, and I like doing parkour, which helps. Cosmetic system is a bit buggy, but it just got posted here, so it might be a launch glitch. Maybe you could add more maps, I’d prefer like a maze-like map, but any works. Also add name tag system, cause I didn’t see one in game, along with the pvp thingy me bobber.  Overall, great start!
